name: SCC_AuthorizationReq
title: SCC_AuthorizationReq
description: The callback is called as soon as an Authorization Request is received.
The challenge optionally transmitted in this request can be queried with SCC_GetGenChallenge.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 – 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
